description: As the Clinical Research Coordinator for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024), configure OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!) to include the Vital Signs CRF template (/home/ga/vital_signs_crf.xls) as a required CRF for both Baseline Assessment and Follow-up Visit event definitions. Record a completed Baseline Assessment for subject DM-102 on February 5, 2024, with vital signs: Systolic 135, Diastolic 88, and Heart Rate 78.
